dietPlan: Maintain a balanced diet rich in leafy greens, fiber, and lean proteins.
Restrict processed sugars, refined carbohydrates, and sugary beverages.
Incorporate low glycemic index foods like whole grains, legumes, and non-starchy vegetables.
Adopt a DASH-style diet: low sodium (< 2,300 mg/day), low saturated fats.
Incorporate heart-healthy fats (olive oil, avocados, nuts) and foods high in Omega-3.
Avoid excessive protein intake; choose high-quality, plant-based proteins when possible.
Minimize dietary sodium and phosphorus-rich foods.
exercisePlan: Perform at least 150 minutes of moderate aerobic exercise (e.g. brisk walking) weekly.
Incorporate daily cardiovascular exercises like jogging, swimming, or cycling.
preventionPlan.sleepRecommendation: 7 - 8 hours of quality sleep per night
lifestyleChanges: Ensure consistent hydration and regular checkups.
Monitor fasting blood glucose levels monthly.
Aim for gradual weight reduction if BMI is elevated.
Check blood pressure weekly and track trends.
Verify kidney function parameters (e.g. eGFR, Serum Creatinine) in annual checkups.
precautions: Monitor vitals periodically. If acute chest pain, shortness of breath, or numbness occurs, consult a physician immediately.
Avoid self-prescribing NSAIDs (like ibuprofen) as they can stress the kidneys.
